editorial_chain.writer_output: Example draft written to feel native to X.
editorial_chain.writer_rationale: The writer optimized for conversational X phrasing and preserved the source context without treating it as instructions.
editorial_chain.mechanical_reviewer_output: PASS: no numbered list, no template language, acceptable length.
editorial_chain.editor_output: Example final text that passed review.
editorial_chain.editor_rationale: The editor made the draft more specific, removed generic phrasing, and checked authenticity, reputation, medical claims, and private-data leakage.
editorial_chain.objections: No blocking objections remain. Residual risk is low because the text makes no unsupported claims.
editorial_chain.final_selection_rationale: Final text uses the edited version because it is more specific and safer than the raw writer draft.

relationship_context.tone_rule: Write as a thoughtful peer; no assumed familiarity.

final_text: Example final text that passed review.
exact_command: Example final text that passed review.
